name: ollama-code-completions
description: Inline ghost-text autocomplete powered by a self-hosted Ollama instance.

ollamaCodeCompletions.serverUrl.markdownDescription:
Base URL of the Ollama server.

[Test connection](command:ollamaCodeCompletions.testConnection)

ollamaCodeCompletions.model.markdownDescription:
Model to use for completions. Use the 'Pick Model' command to choose from installed models.

[Pick model from server](command:ollamaCodeCompletions.pickModel)

ollamaCodeCompletions.useAuthentication.markdownDescription:
Send HTTP Basic auth on each request. Credentials are managed via the 'Set Credentials' command (stored in the OS keychain).

[Set credentials](command:ollamaCodeCompletions.setCredentials)   [Clear credentials](command:ollamaCodeCompletions.clearCredentials)

ollamaCodeCompletions.debounceMs.description: Idle time after typing before requesting a completion (milliseconds).

ollamaCodeCompletions.maxPrefixChars.description: Maximum number of characters of prefix sent to the model.

ollamaCodeCompletions.maxSuffixChars.description: Maximum number of characters of suffix sent to the model.

ollamaCodeCompletions.maxPredict.description: Maximum number of tokens for the model to generate (num_predict).

ollamaCodeCompletions.logToFile.markdownDescription:
Write diagnostic log entries to a file in the OS temp directory.

[Show log](command:ollamaCodeCompletions.showLog)

ollamaCodeCompletions.logToOutputChannel.markdownDescription:
Write diagnostic log entries to the 'Ollama Code Completions' output channel.

[Show log](command:ollamaCodeCompletions.showLog)

ollamaCodeCompletions.showStatusBarItem.description: Show the Ollama Code Completions status bar item.
